config.ptdialogue.title: ptdialogue Settings
config.ptdialogue.distanceFromCenter.too: Distance in pixels from screen center to dialogue box. Default: 150
config.ptdialogue.windowScale.tooltip: Scale multiplier for the dialogue box. Default: 1.0
config.ptdialogue.edgePadding.tooltip: Screen edge padding (fraction of width) before text wraps. Default: 0.3
config.ptdialogue.verticalPaddingFractio: Vertical padding (fraction of screen height) used to clip messages inside the history background arches. Default: 0.075
